EmailTemplate.name: AES - PIN Regeneration
EmailTemplate.subject: Your new shift approval PIN
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
YOUR NEW ALLIANCE EXTRA STAFF SHIFT APPROVAL PIN.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You've requested a new Shift Approval PIN.
Here’s your updated code:
{!Contact.Shift_Approval_PIN_Number__c}
To approve timesheets, enter your PIN and signature in the Alliance Connect app.
If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us at 1300 662 511 — we’re here to help!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
